evals.prompt: закоммить всё что есть на dev, там новый stage doc и немного кода
evals.expected_output: Determines branch is dev, shows what changed grouped by category (code vs stage docs), stages appropriate files (src/, scripts/, docs/stages/), commits with proper message format including Co-Authored-By, offers push and cherry-pick to main

evals.prompt: сделай коммит только кодовых изменений и запушь на main
evals.expected_output: Stages only src/, scripts/, configs/ — explicitly skips docs/stages/ — commits with proper message, pushes to main

evals.prompt: cherry-pick последний коммит с dev на main и запушь
evals.expected_output: Gets last commit hash from dev log, switches to main, cherry-picks, verifies no docs/stages leaked in, pushes origin main, returns to dev
